revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: * {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} – for categorizing [[WP:Redirect|Redirect]]s from titles to article (or other pages) where the redirect is just a different capitalization * {{tl|Template capitalization}} – ?? * [[Module:String2]] [[Help:Magic words#Formatting|Magic words]] that rewrite the output (copy-paste will get the text as displayed, not as entered): * {{lc:}} – lower case output of the full text * {{uc:}} – upper case output of the full text * {{lcfirst:}} – lower case output of the first character only * {{ucfirst:}} – upper case output of the first character only {{Documentation|content= This list is transcluded into the documentation of the various templates it illustrates. [[Category:Related-topic templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

[[Category:Related-topic templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Case_templates_see_also here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
